title: Create: Mechanical Repair Station
description: Addon to Create:mod. This minecraft mod adds a block that you can use to repair your equipment without need of experience, but you'll need rotation power or FE instead. Some materials are still needed its cheaper.
body:
Repairs items using rotation power, Forge Energy (optional), and mana from Botania (if it's installed, lava as fallback if there is no Botania). The better the item the more.
Repair Station also requires some materials, but it's cheaper and no exp is required
